96 How to Judge a Horoscope
Apart from financial losses, domestic affairs take an
unfortunate turn.
When the 2nd lord is in Lagna with the lord of Lagna,
the native will beget children during the Dasa of the 2nd
lord. He will become famous and rich and engage himself
in charitable work. If the 2nd lord is weak, he will have
meagre earnings.
In the matter of predicting Dasa results, one should
carefully consider the position of the 2nd lord and the
planet in question, not only in Rasi but in the Navamsa
also. There should be a balanced weighing of the
favourable influences.
Financial prosperity may be predicted in the following
periods and sub-periods :—
(a) Lords of the 2nd and 5th or 2nd and 11th if they
have mutually exchanged places, (b) Lords of the 5th and
9th if they are in the 5th and 9th respectively, (c) If the lord
of the 2nd is associated with the 12th lord, then in the
